leadText: The Dubious Disc (Japanese: あやしいパッチ Dubious Patch) is a type of held item introduced in Generation IV. It allows Porygon2 to evolve into Porygon-Z.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Causes Porygon2 to evolve into Porygon-Z when traded while holding it. This consumes the Dubious Disc. In Pokémon Legends: Arceus , due to the absence of held items, the Dubious Disc simply needs to be used on Porygon2 to trigger the Evolution, which consumes the item.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] If the player offers both a Link Cable and Dubious Disc at Luminous Spring , Porygon2 can be evolved into Porygon-Z . This consumes the Link Cable and Dubious Disc. If thrown, it will deal 1 damage (2 if sticky ). Using this item in a dungeon will consume it, with no effect.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD T D S An enigmatic disc that overflows with dubious data. It allows a certain kind of Pokémon to evolve.
